name: Karithopita Spiced Walnut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Orange peel, cut into 2-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the eggs, Bisquick, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon, salt, ground cloves, baking powder, 2 cups of sugar, 2 1/2 cups of chopped walnuts, milk, and oil. Blend together with an electric mixer for 5 minutes.
2. Turn the mixer to high speed and beat the batter for an additional 15 seconds.
3. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Pour the batter into a baking pan measuring 10 x 14 inches and 2 1/2 inches deep. Bake for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 hours.
4. In a medium saucepan, combine 3/4 cup of sugar, water, orange peel, lemon peel, and cinnamon stick. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Add honey and bring mixture to a boil again. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice. Allow syrup to cool before serving. Discard orange and lemon peels, as well as the cinnamon stick.
6. Drizzle the syrup over the cooled cake and sprinkle chopped walnuts and ground cinnamon on top.
